content: Phase 8a: India state GeoJSON polygons + choropleth rendering on map
Phase 8b: Persistent saved scenarios (save / list / delete per user)
Phase 8c: CSV/JSON data export endpoints + UI buttons on charts/tables
Phase 8d: Testing - 15/15 backend + 10/10 frontend (after fix) PASSED
Phase 9: District-level resolution - deferred (would require ~700 district GeoJSON + heavy parallel API calls; recommend separate phase)
